name: validator

metadata.notes: Validator strictly checks input format, ranges (x,q,a_i,K), and operation counts without solving. Checker implements robust token-based parsing to tolerate whitespace variations, resolving the 'checker_rejects_standard_output' issue. It verifies YES branch bijection, slot bounds, and modulo constraints; verifies NO branch interval bounds, Hall violation count, and performs a bounded lexicographical minimality check (capped at L=500) to prevent TLE on large K/x while maintaining correctness for standard cases. Test generator covers all specified buckets: basic_small (samples), boundary_values (x=1, large a_i), random_moderate (mixed ops), adversarial_hall (crafted tight violations), and performance_max (large x/K). expect_oracle=True is set for tests within oracle_limits (x<=20, q<=50, K<=20). The design isolates validation, checking, and generation, ensuring no solver logic leaks into tools and adhering to the checker judge type semantics.
